text:
Great: The waiter (Derrick, i think it was) 
Their lemonade (fresh squeezed) 
Good: Their Burgers and Milkshakes 
Okay: Their Caesar Salad and Fries (you must ask for FF well done) 
Horrible: The Manager who kicks people out of tables because a line is at the door. He had the bus boy drop the check off without the waiters knowledge and then waited for us by staring at the table,-unacceptable.
review:
Great: The waiter (Derrick, i think it was) 
Their lemonade (fresh squeezed) 
Good: Their Burgers and Milkshakes 
Okay: Their Caesar Salad and Fries (you must ask for FF well done) 
Horrible: The Manager who kicks people out of tables because a line is at the door. He had the bus boy drop the check off without the waiters knowledge and then waited for us by staring at the table,-unacceptable.
